verses.2: you who stand in the LORD’s house,
verses.3: Praise the LORD, for the LORD is good.
verses.4: For the LORD has chosen Jacob for himself,
verses.5: For I know that the LORD is great,
verses.6: Whatever the LORD pleased, that he has done,
verses.7: He causes the clouds to rise from the ends of the earth.
verses.8: He struck the firstborn of Egypt,
verses.9: He sent signs and wonders into the middle of you, Egypt,
verses.12: and gave their land for a heritage,
verses.14: For the LORD will judge his people
verses.15: The idols of the nations are silver and gold,
verses.16: They have mouths, but they can’t speak.
verses.17: They have ears, but they can’t hear,
verses.18: Those who make them will be like them,
verses.19: House of Israel, praise the LORD!
verses.20: House of Levi, praise the LORD!
verses.21: Blessed be the LORD from Zion,
